meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve Stuck Apps (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop building invisible apps. Use this intermediate checklist to implement high-impact SEO for SaaS using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance work.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because your code lacks structured data and semantic authority. To break through, move beyond basic meta tags. Implement dynamic server-side rendering, schema markup, and programmatic content generation. By leveraging Claude Code for automated refactoring and Antigravity for infrastructure, you transform static builds into high-ranking, lead-generating SaaS assets.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect feature set, only to launch into the digital void. Your code is clean, your UX is sleek, but the traffic counter stays stubbornly at zero. You are caught in the 'basic app' trap—where high-quality engineering meets zero discoverability. It is a freelancer's worst nightmare: a masterpiece no one can find.

But visibility isn't a mystery; it is an engineering problem. By integrating SEO directly into your deployment pipeline, you move from building software to building assets. We are going to strip away the guesswork, using AI-driven automation to turn your codebase into a search engine magnet. It is time to stop building apps and start building authority.

steps.title: Architecting Semantic URL Structures
steps.description: Ensure your routes follow a logical, keyword-rich hierarchy that search engines can parse effortlessly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my current Next.js routing to support dynamic, SEO-optimized URL patterns that include primary keywords and hierarchical slugs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'analyze routing structure and suggest SEO-friendly slug patterns'

steps.title: Automating JSON-LD Schema Injection
steps.description: Inject structured data programmatically to ensure Google understands your SaaS product's specific value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React component that generates JSON-LD schema markup for SaaS products, including pricing and feature lists.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement dynamic JSON-LD injection in head component'

steps.title: Programmatic Content Generation Engine
steps.description: Use your database to generate landing pages for long-tail keywords, scaling your reach without manual effort.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a script to generate static landing pages based on my existing feature set in the database, optimizing for high-intent queries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create script for programmatic landing page generation'

steps.title: Optimizing Core Web Vitals
steps.description: Speed is a ranking factor. Use AI to audit and optimize your asset loading and bundle sizes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify bottlenecks in my current bundle size and suggest specific code-splitting optimizations to improve LCP and CLS scores.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'run performance audit and apply code-splitting optimizations'

steps.title: Automated Meta-Data Management
steps.description: Ensure every dynamic page has unique, compelling meta titles and descriptions generated by AI based on content.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a hook that generates SEO-optimized meta tags based on page content dynamically during build time.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'integrate dynamic meta-tag generation into build pipeline'

pro_tips: Use 'Edge SEO' by manipulating headers at the middleware level to serve different bot-specific content variants.
Always canonicalize your programmatic pages to avoid duplicate content penalties from thin, generated content.
Implement 'Internal Linking Maps' to ensure your high-authority pages pass link equity to your new feature launches.
Use Claude Code to scan your codebase for 'unused CSS' that bloats render times, hurting your Google PageSpeed score.
Embed your SaaS value proposition in the first 100 words of every page; search engines assign higher weight to early-body text.
content.next_steps: Once your SEO pipeline is live, set up a Google Search Console integration to monitor crawl errors and indexation spikes, then iterate on your highest-performing keywords.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your hard work go unnoticed. Implement these strategies today to dominate search results and turn your freelance projects into high-traffic SaaS powerhouses. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
